title: [v4.0] Add Windows installer support for upgrades
body:
Fixes duplicate installer entries after multiple installs

Backport of #13567

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body:
/approve
LGTM
@TomSweeneyRedHat @ashley-cui @containers/podman-maintainers PTAL

Not sure if anyone else knows enough Windows to truly review this, but lets get this in.
